rows.label: tlk43300061_02_msg0001
rows.name:
I hear that a boy from Iyasaki
has established a direct
trade route to Avaritia.

rows.label: tlk43300061_02_msg0002
rows.name:
That's great news for us! Just
great! It means we'll finally be
able to get back home to Invidia.

rows.label: tlk43300061_02_msg0003
rows.name:
...On the other hand, my wife made
friends here in Iyasaki, and now
she's learning local cooking...

rows.label: tlk43300061_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Said she won't go back till she
knows them all, so I watch boats
go by... At least she's having fun.
